anchors.name: 2008 GFC trough
anchors.brief: Lehman+ deep recession; oil bust drives YoY CPI to ~-2%

anchors.name: 2010-12 expansion
anchors.brief: Slow but steady job growth (PAYEMS YoY +1.5-2%), CPI ~2-3%

anchors.name: 2015-16 oil bust
anchors.brief: Mfg recession, CPI YoY near zero, oil bust deflation

anchors.name: 2018 Q4 vol shock
anchors.brief: Growth still strong YoY (PAYEMS +1.7%); market stress

anchors.name: 2019 H2 slowdown
anchors.brief: Mixed: services strong, mfg recession; CPI ~1.8%

anchors.name: 2020 COVID recession
anchors.brief: Catastrophic growth shock; CPI YoY collapse but not deflation

anchors.name: 2020H2 catch-up
anchors.brief: Recovering but YoY still deep negative; CPI YoY ~1.4%

anchors.name: 2022 H1 inflation
anchors.brief: PAYEMS +5-6% YoY catch-up, CPI peaks at 9.1% in June

anchors.name: 2023 high inflation
anchors.brief: Soft landing but CPI still 3-4%, payrolls +2.5%

anchors.name: 2025 tariff shock
anchors.brief: Breakevens spike; equity drawdown; growth signals mixed
